title: Junior MERN Stack Developer
description: We are seeking a highly motivated and detail-oriented Junior MERN Stack Developer to join our team. As a Junior MERN Stack Developer, you will be responsible for designing, developing, and deploying scalable and efficient web applications using MERN stack. You will work closely with our cross-functional team to identify and prioritize features, and collaborate with our QA team to ensure high-quality delivery. You will also be responsible for troubleshooting and debugging issues, and contributing to the improvement of our codebase. The ideal candidate will have a strong foundation in JavaScript, Node.js, MongoDB, and React, and be able to work in a fast-paced environment with multiple priorities.
